ddls:
CREATE TABLE "bills" (
  "bill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bill */,
  "bill_number" TEXT /* Bill number and version */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject matter of the bill */,
  "filed_by" TEXT /* Legislator who filed the bill */,
  "relationship" TEXT /* Relationship with other bills (e.g., companion, similar) */,
  "last_action" TEXT /* Description of the last action taken on the bill */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the last action (e.g., committee, floor) */,
  "track_bills" TEXT /* Tracking status or notes for the bill */,
  "bill_version" TEXT /* Version of the bill */,
  "introduced_date" TEXT /* Date the bill was introduced */,
  "status" TEXT /* Detailed status of the bill */,
  "committee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the committee the bill is currently in */,
  "sponsor_ids" TEXT /* List of sponsor IDs for the bill */,
  "co_sponsor_ids" TEXT /* List of co-sponsor IDs for the bill */,
  "document_url" TEXT /* URL to the full text of the bill */,
  "public_comments_enabled" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if public comments are allowed */,
  "public_comments_url" TEXT /* URL to the public comments page */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the bill's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bills_filed_by FOREIGN KEY ("filed_by") REFERENCES legislators ("legislator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bills_committee_id FOREIGN KEY ("committee_id") REFERENCES committees ("committee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "legislators" (
  "legislator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each legislator */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the legislator */,
  "party" TEXT /* Political party of the legislator */,
  "district" TEXT /* Legislative district represented by the legislator */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the legislator */,
  "office_phone" TEXT /* Office phone number */,
  "office_address" TEXT /* Office address */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the legislator's official website */,
  "twitter_handle" TEXT /* Twitter handle */,
  "facebook_url" TEXT /* Facebook page URL */,
  "party_leader" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the legislator is a party leader */,
  "committee_ids" TEXT /* List of committee IDs the legislator serves on */,
  "seniority" INTEGER /* Number of years the legislator has served */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the legislator's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("legislator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "committees" (
  "committee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each committee */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the committee */,
  "chair_id" INTEGER /* ID of the committee chair (legislator ID) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the committee's responsibilities */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the committee's official website */,
  "public_comments_enabled" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if public comments are allowed */,
  "public_comments_url" TEXT /* URL to the public comments page */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("committee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_committees_chair_id FOREIGN KEY ("chair_id") REFERENCES legislators ("legislator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "public_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "bill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bill the comment is about */,
  "action_id" INTEGER /* ID of the action the comment is about (optional) */,
  "commenter_name" TEXT /* Name of the commenter */,
  "commenter_email" TEXT /* Email of the commenter */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was submitted */,
  "approved" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the comment is approved for public view */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_public_comments_bill_id FOREIGN KEY ("bill_id") REFERENCES bills ("bill_id")
)
